default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production progress.](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content calibration phase complete; moving forward with 4-5 articles per week across 4 content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Airtable content OS set up for tracking and prioritization; Mike to review and update](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [SEO best practices still key focus; AI impact being monitored but not significantly altering approach](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining high accuracy and becoming a trusted source of truth for state registration laws](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [One article published (Illinois Foreign Registration)](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Site health improved slightly with recent updates](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [4-5 articles per week planned across 4 clusters: annual reports, foreign registrations, registered agent services, and franchise tax](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [20 articles currently in the queue, with pillar pages on hold](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Content Workflow and Review Process

  - [Carrie to stage articles in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Mike to receive Slack notifications for review](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Carrie can publish after Mike's approval](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Airtable content OS to be used for tracking and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### SEO and AI Considerations

  - [Current SEO best practices still primary focus](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [AI impact being monitored, but not significantly altering approach](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Direct, straightforward content likely to perform well in AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Emphasis on accuracy and becoming a trusted source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Some duplicate title tags and H1s due to blog template; to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Broken links to be fixed](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Performance tracking setup in progress, awaiting new interface from Dave](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review and update Airtable content OS](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Carrie to update and publish Illinois Foreign Registration article](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Fix broken links on "When to Foreign Register in a New State" page](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Continue producing 4-5 articles per week across content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Monitor SEO performance and AI impact on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rBEXk8cUq2pzRW-JZdsw2SD8DzAjxzyH?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
